
# Corrupted Ledger Fixture

This directory intentionally contains malformed and contradictory ledger artifacts for recovery and replay hardening tests.

## Contents

* `ledger.json`: structurally inconsistent records
* `events.ndjson`: invalid sequence ordering and duplicate identifiers
* `state-head.txt`: impossible head reference
